documentation:
Attribute BackupRetentionPeriod: The retention time of backup data.

Valid values: 0 to 1825. Default value: 730 days.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.datasource.BackupPlan.attr_backup_start_time
documentation: Attribute BackupStartTime: The start time of full Backup.

documentation: Attribute BackupStorageType: Built-in storage type:.

documentation: Attribute CreateTime: The creation time of the backup plans.

documentation: Attribute CrossAliyunId: The UID that is backed up across Alibaba cloud accounts.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.datasource.BackupPlan.attr_cross_role_name
documentation: Attribute CrossRoleName: The name of the RAM role that is backed up across Alibaba cloud accounts.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.datasource.BackupPlan.attr_database_type
documentation: Attribute DatabaseType: Database type.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.datasource.BackupPlan.attr_duplication_archive_period
documentation: Attribute DuplicationArchivePeriod: The storage time for conversion to archive cold standby is 365 days by default.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.datasource.BackupPlan.attr_duplication_infrequent_access_period
documentation:
Attribute DuplicationInfrequentAccessPeriod: The storage time is converted to low-frequency access.

The default time is 180 days.

documentation: Attribute EnableBackupLog: Whether to enable incremental log Backup.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::DBS::BackupPlan`.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosBackupPlan\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-dbs-backupplan>

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.datasource.BackupPlanProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `BackupPlan`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-dbs-backupplan>

```
param backup_plan_id

Property backupPlanId: The ID of the backup plan.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.datasource.BackupPlanProps.backup_plan_id
documentation: Property backupPlanId: The ID of the backup plan.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.datasource.BackupPlanProps.refresh_options
documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.datasource.BackupPlans.attr_backup_plans
documentation: Attribute BackupPlans: The list of backup plans.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::DBS::BackupPlans`, which is used to query the information about backup schedules.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosBackupPlans\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-dbs-backupplans>

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.datasource.BackupPlansProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `BackupPlans`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-dbs-backupplans>

```
param backup_plan_id

Property backupPlanId: The ID of the backup schedule.

param backup_plan_name

Property backupPlanName: The name of the backup schedule.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.datasource.RosBackupPlan.refresh_options
documentation:
:Property:

refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
Default is Never.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::DBS::BackupPlan`.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `BackupPlan` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-dbs-backupplan>

classes.name: ros_cdk_dbs.Download

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.Download.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.Download.attr_bak_set_id
documentation: Attribute BakSetId: The ID of the backup set.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.Download.attr_download_address_info
documentation: Attribute DownloadAddressInfo: The download address information.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.Download.attr_instance_name
documentation: Attribute InstanceName: The ID of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.Download.attr_task_id
documentation: Attribute TaskId: The ID of the download task.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DBS::Download`, which is used to create an advanced download task.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDownload\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dbs-download>

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.DownloadProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Download`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dbs-download>

```
param format_type

Property formatType: The format to which the downloaded backup set is converted. Valid values: CSV|SQL|Parquet

param instance_name

Property instanceName: The ID of the instance.

param bak_set_id

Property bakSetId: The ID of the backup set. You can call the DescribeBackups operation to query the ID of the backup set. This parameter is required if the BakSetType parameter is set to full.

param bak_set_size

Property bakSetSize: The size of the full backup set. Unit: bytes. You can call the DescribeBackups operation to query the size of the full backup set.

param bak_set_type

Property bakSetType: The type of the download task. Valid values: full: downloads a full backup set pitr: downloads a backup set at a specific point in time.

param delete_backup_set_in_oss

Property deleteBackupSetInOss: Whether to delete the backup set in OSS when deleting the stack. Valid values: true|false, default is true.

param download_address_duration

Property downloadAddressDuration: When the download target is a URL, set the link validity period. The default URL validity period is 7200 seconds. The effective duration range can be set from 300 seconds to 86400 seconds

param download_point_in_time

Property downloadPointInTime: The point in time at which the backup set is downloaded. Specify a UNIX timestamp representing the number of milliseconds that have elapsed since January 1, 1970, 00:00:00 UTC. This parameter is required if the BakSetType parameter is set to pitr.

param target_bucket

Property targetBucket: The name of the OSS bucket that is used to store the backup set. This parameter is required if the TargetType parameter is set to OSS. Make sure that your account is granted the AliyunDBSDefaultRole permission. For more information, see Use RAM for resource authorization. You can also grant permissions based on the operation instructions in the Resource Access Management (RAM) console.

param target_oss_region

Property targetOssRegion: The region in which the OSS bucket resides. This parameter is required if the TargetType parameter is set to OSS.

param target_path

Property targetPath: The destination path to which the backup set is downloaded. This parameter is required if the TargetType parameter is set to OSS.

param target_type

Property targetType: The type of the destination to which the backup set is downloaded. Valid values: OSS|URL
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.DownloadProps.format_type
documentation:
Property formatType: The format to which the downloaded backup set is converted.

Valid values: CSV|SQL|Parquet

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.DownloadProps.instance_name
documentation: Property instanceName: The ID of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.DownloadProps.bak_set_id
documentation:
Property bakSetId: The ID of the backup set.

You can call the DescribeBackups operation to query the ID of the backup set.
This parameter is required if the BakSetType parameter is set to full.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.DownloadProps.bak_set_size
documentation:
Property bakSetSize: The size of the full backup set.

Unit: bytes.
You can call the DescribeBackups operation to query the size of the full backup set.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.DownloadProps.bak_set_type
documentation:
Property bakSetType: The type of the download task.

Valid values:
full: downloads a full backup set
pitr: downloads a backup set at a specific point in time.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.DownloadProps.delete_backup_set_in_oss
documentation:
Property deleteBackupSetInOss: Whether to delete the backup set in OSS when deleting the stack.

Valid values: true|false, default is true.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.DownloadProps.download_address_duration
documentation:
Property downloadAddressDuration: When the download target is a URL, set the link validity period.

The default URL validity period is 7200 seconds.
The effective duration range can be set from 300 seconds to 86400 seconds

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.DownloadProps.download_point_in_time
documentation:
Property downloadPointInTime: The point in time at which the backup set is downloaded.

Specify a UNIX timestamp representing the number of milliseconds that have elapsed since January 1, 1970, 00:00:00 UTC.
This parameter is required if the BakSetType parameter is set to pitr.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.DownloadProps.target_bucket
documentation:
Property targetBucket: The name of the OSS bucket that is used to store the backup set.

This parameter is required if the TargetType parameter is set to OSS.
Make sure that your account is granted the AliyunDBSDefaultRole permission.
For more information, see Use RAM for resource authorization.
You can also grant permissions based on the operation instructions in the Resource Access Management (RAM) console.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.DownloadProps.target_oss_region
documentation:
Property targetOssRegion: The region in which the OSS bucket resides.

This parameter is required if the TargetType parameter is set to OSS.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.DownloadProps.target_path
documentation:
Property targetPath: The destination path to which the backup set is downloaded.

This parameter is required if the TargetType parameter is set to OSS.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.DownloadProps.target_type
documentation:
Property targetType: The type of the destination to which the backup set is downloaded.

Valid values: OSS|URL

classes.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTask

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTask.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTask.attr_restore_task_id
documentation: Attribute RestoreTaskId: The ID of the restoration task.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DBS::RestoreTask`, which is used to create a restore task.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosRestoreTask\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dbs-restoretask>

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `RestoreTask`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dbs-restoretask>

```
param backup_plan_id

Property backupPlanId: The ID of the backup plan.

param destination_endpoint_instance_type

Property destinationEndpointInstanceType: The location of the database. Valid values: - rds - ecs - express: a database connected over express connect, VPN Gateway, or smart gateway. - agent: The database connected through the backup Gateway - dds: apsaradb for MongoDB - kvstore - polardb - drds - dg: the database is directly connected through IP Address: Port.

param restore_task_name

Property restoreTaskName: The name of the restoration task.

param backup_gateway_id

Property backupGatewayId: The ID of the backup gateway. NoteDestinationEndpointInstanceType if you set this parameter to agent, this parameter is required.

param backup_set_id

Property backupSetId: The ID of the full backup set used for restoration, which is mutually exclusive to RestoreTime.

param destination_endpoint_database_name

Property destinationEndpointDatabaseName: The name of the RDS database. Note When the database type is PostgreSQL or MongoDB, this parameter is required.

param destination_endpoint_instance_id

Property destinationEndpointInstanceId: The ID of the ApsaraDB RDS instance to query. NoteDestinationEndpointInstanceType if the value is RDS, ECS, DDS, or Express, this parameter is required.

param destination_endpoint_ip

Property destinationEndpointIp: The endpoint used to connect to the database. NoteDestinationEndpointInstanceType is express, agent, or other. This parameter is required.

param destination_endpoint_oracle_sid

Property destinationEndpointOracleSid: The SID of the Oracle instance. Note This parameter is required if the database type is Oracle.

param destination_endpoint_password

Property destinationEndpointPassword: The password that is used to log on to the RDS instance. Note You must specify this parameter when the database type is Redis, or the database location is agent and the database type is MSSQL.

param destination_endpoint_port

Property destinationEndpointPort: The port that is used to access the database of the primary MySQL server. NoteDestinationEndpointInstanceType is in the format of express, agent, other, or ECS. This parameter is required.

param destination_endpoint_region

Property destinationEndpointRegion: The region of the database. NoteDestinationEndpointInstanceType for RDS, ECS, DDS, Express, or Agent, this parameter is required.

param destination_endpoint_user_name

Property destinationEndpointUserName: The database account. Note You must specify this parameter when the database type is Redis, or the database location is agent and the database type is MSSQL.

param duplicate_conflict

Property duplicateConflict: The handling method for conflicts between objects with the same name. Valid values: failure: The object with the same name fails (default). renamenew: renames an object with the same name.

param restore_dir

Property restoreDir: DestinationEndpointInstanceType this parameter is required when agent is specified and the backup schedule is MySQL.

param restore_home

Property restoreHome: Database Program Directory.

param restore_objects

Property restoreObjects: Restore an object. Note For details, see the following RestoreObjects if the database is located in an agent, this parameter is required in other scenarios.

param restore_time

Property restoreTime: The time when the fault is restored. Set the value to 1554560477000.

param start_task

Property startTask: Start restore task after creating a recovery task.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.backup_plan_id
documentation: Property backupPlanId: The ID of the backup plan.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.destination_endpoint_instance_type
documentation:
Property destinationEndpointInstanceType: The location of the database.

Valid values:

- rds
- ecs
- express: a database connected over express connect, VPN Gateway, or smart gateway.
- agent: The database connected through the backup Gateway
- dds: apsaradb for MongoDB
- kvstore
- polardb
- drds
- dg: the database is directly connected through IP Address: Port.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.restore_task_name
documentation: Property restoreTaskName: The name of the restoration task.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.backup_gateway_id
documentation:
Property backupGatewayId: The ID of the backup gateway.

NoteDestinationEndpointInstanceType if you set this parameter to agent, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.backup_set_id
documentation: Property backupSetId: The ID of the full backup set used for restoration, which is mutually exclusive to RestoreTime.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.destination_endpoint_database_name
documentation:
Property destinationEndpointDatabaseName: The name of the RDS database.

Note When the database type is PostgreSQL or MongoDB, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.destination_endpoint_instance_id
documentation:
Property destinationEndpointInstanceId: The ID of the ApsaraDB RDS instance to query.

NoteDestinationEndpointInstanceType if the value is RDS, ECS, DDS, or Express, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.destination_endpoint_ip
documentation:
Property destinationEndpointIp: The endpoint used to connect to the database.

NoteDestinationEndpointInstanceType is express, agent, or other. This parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.destination_endpoint_oracle_sid
documentation:
Property destinationEndpointOracleSid: The SID of the Oracle instance.

Note This parameter is required if the database type is Oracle.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.destination_endpoint_password
documentation:
Property destinationEndpointPassword: The password that is used to log on to the RDS instance.

Note You must specify this parameter when the database type is Redis, or the database location
is agent and the database type is MSSQL.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.destination_endpoint_port
documentation:
Property destinationEndpointPort: The port that is used to access the database of the primary MySQL server.

NoteDestinationEndpointInstanceType is in the format of express, agent, other, or ECS. This parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.destination_endpoint_region
documentation:
Property destinationEndpointRegion: The region of the database.

NoteDestinationEndpointInstanceType for RDS, ECS, DDS, Express, or Agent, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.destination_endpoint_user_name
documentation:
Property destinationEndpointUserName: The database account.

Note You must specify this parameter when the database type is Redis, or the database location
is agent and the database type is MSSQL.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.duplicate_conflict
documentation:
Property duplicateConflict: The handling method for conflicts between objects with the same name.

Valid values:
failure: The object with the same name fails (default).
renamenew: renames an object with the same name.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.restore_dir
documentation: Property restoreDir: DestinationEndpointInstanceType this parameter is required when agent is specified and the backup schedule is MySQL.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.restore_home
documentation: Property restoreHome: Database Program Directory.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.restore_objects
documentation:
Property restoreObjects: Restore an object.

Note For details, see the following RestoreObjects if the database is located in an agent, this parameter is required in other scenarios.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.restore_time
documentation:
Property restoreTime: The time when the fault is restored.

Set the value to 1554560477000.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RestoreTaskProps.start_task
documentation: Property startTask: Start restore task after creating a recovery task.

documentation:
:Property:

targetPath: The destination path to which the backup set is downloaded.
This parameter is required if the TargetType parameter is set to OSS.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosDownload.target_type
documentation:
:Property:

targetType: The type of the destination to which the backup set is downloaded.
Valid values: OSS|URL

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DBS::Download`, which is used to create an advanced download task.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Download` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dbs-download>

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosDownloadProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `RosDownload`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dbs-download>

```
param format_type



param instance_name



param bak_set_id



param bak_set_size



param bak_set_type



param delete_backup_set_in_oss



param download_address_duration



param download_point_in_time



param target_bucket



param target_oss_region



param target_path



param target_type

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosDownloadProps.format_type
documentation:
:Property:

formatType: The format to which the downloaded backup set is converted.
Valid values: CSV|SQL|Parquet

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosDownloadProps.instance_name
documentation: :Property: instanceName: The ID of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosDownloadProps.bak_set_id
documentation:
:Property:

bakSetId: The ID of the backup set. You can call the DescribeBackups operation to query the ID of the backup set.
This parameter is required if the BakSetType parameter is set to full.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosDownloadProps.bak_set_size
documentation:
:Property:

bakSetSize: The size of the full backup set. Unit: bytes.
You can call the DescribeBackups operation to query the size of the full backup set.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosDownloadProps.bak_set_type
documentation:
:Property:

bakSetType: The type of the download task. Valid values:
full: downloads a full backup set
pitr: downloads a backup set at a specific point in time.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosDownloadProps.delete_backup_set_in_oss
documentation:
:Property:

deleteBackupSetInOss: Whether to delete the backup set in OSS when deleting the stack.
Valid values: true|false, default is true.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosDownloadProps.download_address_duration
documentation:
:Property:

downloadAddressDuration: When the download target is a URL, set the link validity period.
The default URL validity period is 7200 seconds.
The effective duration range can be set from 300 seconds to 86400 seconds

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosDownloadProps.download_point_in_time
documentation:
:Property:

downloadPointInTime: The point in time at which the backup set is downloaded.
Specify a UNIX timestamp representing the number of milliseconds that have elapsed since January 1, 1970, 00:00:00 UTC.
This parameter is required if the BakSetType parameter is set to pitr.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosDownloadProps.target_bucket
documentation:
:Property:

targetBucket: The name of the OSS bucket that is used to store the backup set.
This parameter is required if the TargetType parameter is set to OSS.
Make sure that your account is granted the AliyunDBSDefaultRole permission.
For more information, see Use RAM for resource authorization.
You can also grant permissions based on the operation instructions in the Resource Access Management (RAM) console.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosDownloadProps.target_oss_region
documentation:
:Property:

targetOssRegion: The region in which the OSS bucket resides.
This parameter is required if the TargetType parameter is set to OSS.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosDownloadProps.target_path
documentation:
:Property:

targetPath: The destination path to which the backup set is downloaded.
This parameter is required if the TargetType parameter is set to OSS.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosDownloadProps.target_type
documentation:
:Property:

targetType: The type of the destination to which the backup set is downloaded.
Valid values: OSS|URL

classes.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.__init__
documentation:
---
param enable_resource_property_constraint: '-'
param id: '- scoped id of the resource.'
param props: '- resource properties.'
param scope: '- scope in which this resource is defined.'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask._render_properties
documentation:
---
param props: '-'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.attr_restore_task_id
documentation: :Attribute: RestoreTaskId: The ID of the restoration task.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.backup_plan_id
documentation: :Property: backupPlanId: The ID of the backup plan.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.destination_endpoint_instance_type
documentation:
:Property:

destinationEndpointInstanceType: The location of the database. Valid values:

- rds
- ecs
- express: a database connected over express connect, VPN Gateway, or smart gateway.
- agent: The database connected through the backup Gateway
- dds: apsaradb for MongoDB
- kvstore
- polardb
- drds
- dg: the database is directly connected through IP Address: Port.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.restore_task_name
documentation: :Property: restoreTaskName: The name of the restoration task.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.backup_gateway_id
documentation:
:Property:

backupGatewayId: The ID of the backup gateway.
NoteDestinationEndpointInstanceType if you set this parameter to agent, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.backup_set_id
documentation:
:Property:

backupSetId: The ID of the full backup set used for restoration, which is mutually exclusive to
RestoreTime.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.destination_endpoint_database_name
documentation:
:Property:

destinationEndpointDatabaseName: The name of the RDS database.
Note When the database type is PostgreSQL or MongoDB, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.destination_endpoint_instance_id
documentation:
:Property:

destinationEndpointInstanceId: The ID of the ApsaraDB RDS instance to query.
NoteDestinationEndpointInstanceType if the value is RDS, ECS, DDS, or Express, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.destination_endpoint_ip
documentation:
:Property:

destinationEndpointIp: The endpoint used to connect to the database.
NoteDestinationEndpointInstanceType is express, agent, or other. This parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.destination_endpoint_oracle_sid
documentation:
:Property:

destinationEndpointOracleSid: The SID of the Oracle instance.
Note This parameter is required if the database type is Oracle.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.destination_endpoint_password
documentation:
:Property:

destinationEndpointPassword: The password that is used to log on to the RDS instance.
Note You must specify this parameter when the database type is Redis, or the database location
is agent and the database type is MSSQL.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.destination_endpoint_port
documentation:
:Property:

destinationEndpointPort: The port that is used to access the database of the primary MySQL server.
NoteDestinationEndpointInstanceType is in the format of express, agent, other, or ECS. This parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.destination_endpoint_region
documentation:
:Property:

destinationEndpointRegion: The region of the database.
NoteDestinationEndpointInstanceType for RDS, ECS, DDS, Express, or Agent, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.destination_endpoint_user_name
documentation:
:Property:

destinationEndpointUserName: The database account.
Note You must specify this parameter when the database type is Redis, or the database location
is agent and the database type is MSSQL.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.duplicate_conflict
documentation:
:Property:

duplicateConflict: The handling method for conflicts between objects with the same name. Valid values:
failure: The object with the same name fails (default).
renamenew: renames an object with the same name.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.restore_dir
documentation: :Property: restoreDir: DestinationEndpointInstanceType this parameter is required when agent is specified and the backup schedule is MySQL.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.restore_home
documentation: :Property: restoreHome: Database Program Directory.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.restore_objects
documentation:
:Property:

restoreObjects: Restore an object.
Note For details, see the following RestoreObjects if the database is located in an agent, this parameter is required in other scenarios.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.restore_time
documentation: :Property: restoreTime: The time when the fault is restored. Set the value to 1554560477000.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTask.start_task
documentation: :Property: startTask: Start restore task after creating a recovery task.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DBS::RestoreTask`, which is used to create a restore task.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `RestoreTask` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dbs-restoretask>

methods.name: ros_cdk_dbs.RosRestoreTaskProps.__init__

